meta.title: 乌托邦与现实困境
meta.description: Native-level discourse on utopia and real-world dilemmas in Chinese: idioms, dystopian literature, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 이상향·현실의 딜레마 담화: 성어, 디스토피아 문학, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「乌托邦」(wūtuōbāng, from "utopia") means an ideal, imagined perfect society.
explanation.ko: 「乌托邦」(wūtuōbāng)는 '이상적이고 완벽한 상상 속 사회'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「乌托邦」是什么意思？(What does 乌托邦 mean?)
choices: 乌托邦(utopia — an ideal, imagined perfect society)

explanation.en: 「反乌托邦」(fǎn wūtuōbāng, dystopia) depicts a totalitarian, oppressive, or absurd negative future society.
explanation.ko: 「反乌托邦」(fǎn wūtuōbāng)는 전체주의·억압적이거나 부조리한 부정적 미래 사회를 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 「反乌托邦」是什么意思？(What does 反乌托邦 mean?)
choices: 描绘极权、压迫或荒诞的负面未来社会图景(depicting a totalitarian, oppressive, or absurd negative future society)
现实中真实存在的乌托邦

explanation.en: This phrase refers to the gap between an envisioned ideal and actual reality.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 이상적 청사진과 실제 현실 사이의 격차를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「理想与现实的落差」是什么意思？(What does 理想与现实的落差 mean?)
choices: 人们所设想的美好蓝图与真实境况之间存在的差距(the gap between people's envisioned ideal blueprint and actual reality)

explanation.en: 「画饼充饥」(lit. "drawing a cake to satisfy hunger") is an idiom meaning "to use unrealistic fantasy for self-comfort, without actually solving the problem".
explanation.ko: 「画饼充饥」는 '그림의 떡으로 배고픔을 달래다'라는 뜻의 성어로, 비현실적 공상으로 자신을 위로할 뿐 실제 문제는 해결하지 못함을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「画饼充饥」是什么意思？(What does 画饼充饥 mean?)
choices: 以真实可行的方案应对困境
用不切实际的空想来自我安慰，无法真正解决问题(using unrealistic fantasy to comfort oneself, unable to actually solve the problem)

explanation.en: 「乌托邦精神」refers to the spirit of persistently pursuing progress and holding onto ideals despite knowing they can't be fully realized.
explanation.ko: 「乌托邦精神」는 이상이 완전히 실현되기 어려움을 알면서도 아름다운 비전을 품고 진보를 추구하는 정신을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「乌托邦精神」通常指什么？(What does 乌托邦精神 usually refer to?)
choices: 尽管深知理想难以完全实现，依然怀抱美好愿景、不断追求进步的精神(the spirit of continually pursuing progress and cherishing a beautiful vision, despite knowing the ideal is hard to fully realize)

explanation.en: 「乌托邦」means "utopia".
explanation.ko: 「乌托邦」는 '이상향'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 柏拉图的《理想国》被视为西方最早系统构建___社会蓝图的哲学著作之一。(Plato's Republic is regarded as one of the earliest philosophical works in the West to systematically construct a utopian societal blueprint.)

explanation.en: 「反乌托邦」means "dystopia".
explanation.ko: 「反乌托邦」는 '디스토피아'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 奥威尔的《一九八四》是一部典型的___小说，深刻揭示了极权统治下个体自由被彻底剥夺的恐怖图景。(Orwell's "1984" is a typical dystopian novel, profoundly revealing the terrifying picture of individual freedom being completely stripped away under totalitarian rule.)
choices: 现实中真实存在的乌托邦

explanation.en: 「理想与现实的落差」describes the gap between ideal and reality.
explanation.ko: 「理想与现实的落差」는 이상과 현실의 괴리를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 许多社会改革者常常面临___的困境，理想中的美好蓝图往往难以在复杂的现实中完全实现。(Many social reformers often face the predicament of the gap between ideal and reality; the beautiful blueprint envisioned in one's ideal is often hard to fully realize in complex reality.)

explanation.en: 「画饼充饥」describes empty comfort without real solutions.
explanation.ko: 「画饼充饥」는 실제 해결책 없는 헛된 위안을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 空谈那些遥不可及的美好愿景，却不采取实际行动，无异于___，终究无法真正改变现状。(Merely talking about unreachable beautiful visions without taking real action is no different from "drawing a cake to satisfy hunger," ultimately unable to truly change the status quo.)
choices: 以真实可行的方案应对困境

explanation.en: 「乌托邦精神」describes persisting in pursuing ideals despite knowing they're unattainable.
explanation.ko: 「乌托邦精神」는 도달할 수 없음을 알면서도 이상을 추구하는 정신을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 尽管深知完美社会难以企及，许多理想主义者依然秉持着___，不断为改善现实而努力奋斗。(Although deeply aware that a perfect society is unattainable, many idealists still uphold a utopian spirit, continually striving to improve reality.)
choices: 尽管深知理想难以完全实现，依然怀抱美好愿景、不断追求进步的精神

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这部反乌托邦小说___了极权体制对人性与自由的彻底摧残。(This dystopian novel exposed totalitarian systems' thorough destruction of humanity and freedom.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，___不如脚踏实地，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。(Rather than blindly indulging in illusory utopian fantasies, it's better to stay grounded, gradually promoting practical, feasible improvements within the soil of reality.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这一理想社会的构想___在理论上极具吸引力，___在实际推行过程中却往往面临重重难以逾越的现实阻碍。(Even though this vision of an ideal society is extremely appealing in theory, it often faces numerous seemingly insurmountable practical obstacles during actual implementation.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，___是因为它承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。(The reason utopian ideals have retained their allure for thousands of years is precisely because they carry humanity's eternal, unextinguishable longing for a better world.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，___容易沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。(Once an ideal completely breaks free from the constraints of reality, it easily degenerates into an impractical castle in the air.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，乌托邦理想的真正价值___不在于其能否完全实现，而在于它为现实的改良提供了不懈追寻的方向。(In the final analysis, the true value of utopian ideals still doesn't lie in whether they can be fully realized, but in the direction they provide for the relentless pursuit of improving reality.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，理想的召唤与现实的约束___共同推动着社会不断向前演进。(From this we can see that both the calling of ideals and the constraints of reality jointly drive society to continuously evolve forward.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，历史上许多乌托邦式的社会实验___因忽视了复杂的人性而以失败告终。(As everyone knows, many historical utopian social experiments often ended in failure due to ignoring the complexity of human nature.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 乌托邦理想的意义，岂___虚幻的空想，实乃鞭策人类不断超越现实局限、追求进步的不竭动力。(The significance of utopian ideals is by no means merely illusory fantasy, but truly an inexhaustible driving force that spurs humanity to continually transcend the limitations of reality and pursue progress.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 反乌托邦文学___通过极端化的想象，警示人们警惕权力滥用的潜在风险。(Dystopian literature often warns people to be wary of the potential risks of power abuse through extreme, imaginative scenarios.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 脚踏实地: 不如脚踏实地 (not 脚踏实地不如).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '脚踏实地' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如脚踏实地'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，脚踏实地不如，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。(Rather than blindly indulging in illusory utopian fantasies, it's better to stay grounded, gradually promoting practical, feasible improvements within the soil of reality.) — find the error
choices: 与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，不如脚踏实地，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。
与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，脚踏实地不如，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。
与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，不如在现实的土壤中脚踏实地，逐步推动切实可行的改良。
与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，脚踏实地，不如在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，因为是它承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。(The reason utopian ideals have retained their allure for thousands of years is precisely because they carry humanity's eternal, unextinguishable longing for a better world.) — find the error
choices: 乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，是因为它承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。
乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，因为是它承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。
乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，是它因为承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。
乌托邦式的理想之所以历经数千年依然魅力不减，它是因为承载着人类对更加美好世界永恒不灭的向往。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，容易才沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。(Once an ideal completely breaks free from the constraints of reality, it easily degenerates into an impractical castle in the air.) — find the error
choices: 一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，就容易沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。
一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，容易才沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。
一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，才容易沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。
一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，容易沦为才不切实际的空中楼阁。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，不如脚踏实地，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良 ("Rather than blindly indulging in illusory utopian fantasies, it's better to stay grounded, gradually promoting practical, feasible improvements within the soil of reality").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，不如脚踏实地，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良' (허황된 이상향의 환상에 빠져있느니 차라리 현실에 발을 딛고 착실히 실현 가능한 개선을 추진하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味沉溺于虚幻的乌托邦幻想，__________，在现实的土壤中逐步推动切实可行的改良。(Rather than blindly indulging in illusory utopian fantasies, it's better to stay grounded, gradually promoting practical, feasible improvements within the soil of reality.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，就容易沦为不切实际的空中楼阁 ("Once an ideal completely breaks free from the constraints of reality, it easily degenerates into an impractical castle in the air").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，就容易沦为不切实际的空中楼阁' (이상은 일단 현실의 제약에서 완전히 벗어나면 비현실적인 공중누각으로 전락하기 쉽다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一种理想一旦完全脱离现实的约束，__________沦为不切实际的空中楼阁。(Once an ideal completely breaks free from the constraints of reality, it easily degenerates into an impractical castle in the air.)
